_meta.description: SENTINEL APEX GOD-MODE Stability Lock — Golden Build Invariants

version_lock.rule: ALL four version references MUST match exactly. Any drift is a HARD VIOLATION.

apex_ai_invariants.description: Every intel item MUST have a fully populated apex_ai block. This is the core intelligence product.
apex_ai_invariants.rule: apex_ai block MUST be present and non-null on ALL items. Missing apex_ai = HARD FAIL.

stage_pass_requirements.STAGE_1_3_master_pipeline: PASS (warnings about manifest shrink are architectural/expected)
stage_pass_requirements.STAGE_3_1_apex_ai_enrichment: PASS -- all items have apex_ai and apex fields
stage_pass_requirements.STAGE_3_5_r2_upload: PASS (sentinel-apex-data OK; sentinel-apex-reports OK after bucket+token fix)

manifest_shrink_warning.message: Manifest SHRANK: N -> batch_size (N entries lost)
manifest_shrink_warning.root_cause: bootstrap_critical_files.py resets feed_manifest.json to [] on every run. This is BY DESIGN. The manifest reflects current batch only. Historical data lives in R2.
manifest_shrink_warning.action: IGNORE -- architectural, expected on every run

phase8_feed_too_small.root_cause: Internal quality engine assertion fires on batches < threshold. Non-fatal, pipeline continues.

r2_reports_access_denied.message: WARN: HTML reports R2 sync FAILED (AccessDenied)
r2_reports_access_denied.root_cause: sentinel-apex-reports bucket was missing or token lacked permission
r2_reports_access_denied.status: FIXED in v143.5.0 -- bucket created, dedicated token wired via CF_R2_REPORTS_KEY_ID

stix_manifest_empty.message: [merge] Loaded existing manifest: 0 items from feed_manifest.json
stix_manifest_empty.root_cause: data/stix/feed_manifest.json is reset to [] by bootstrap_critical_files.py on every run (same root cause as manifest_shrink_warning). The production feed is api/feed.json (populated by run_pipeline.py). field_preserving_merge.py auto-populates the stix manifest from api/feed.json as STAGE 3.1.5/3.1.6.

stability_checklist.description: Run this checklist before any major code change or before declaring a build stable
items: [ ] All 33 pipeline stages pass (2 known non-fatal WARNs are acceptable)
[ ] Version lock: config/version.json == index.html PLATFORM_VERSION == gateway header
[ ] apex_ai block present on ALL feed items (not null, not missing)
[ ] kill_chain = PRO_REQUIRED for free tier (tier-gating intact)
[ ] Dashboard shows SENTINEL APEX V{version} (correct version displayed to users)
[ ] EMBEDDED_INTEL populated with N items (instant-render active)
[ ] API /api/preview/ returns status: ok with items array
[ ] 0 encoding errors (no mojibake, no BOM, no null bytes in feed/index)
[ ] Payment gateway links present (PayPal, BNB, UPI)

hardening_invariants.description: STABLE CONTRACT enforcement layer. These invariants are PERMANENT and must survive every scheduled pipeline run.

validate_manifest_schema.py.purpose: Hard-fail schema gate -- enforces STABLE CONTRACT fields
validate_manifest_schema.py.note: data/stix/feed_manifest.json is allowed to be empty (bootstrap reset)

field_preserving_merge.py.purpose: Append-only field-preserving merge -- NEVER drops apex_ai or risk_score
field_preserving_merge.py.auto_populate: If data/stix/feed_manifest.json is empty, auto-populates from api/feed.json

apex_stability_lock.py.purpose: Baseline stability lock -- validates dashboard invariants pre/post pipeline
checks: Top-Threats computed dynamically in JS (never static)
No pipeline injection markers in frontend files
